title: AvatarPointillist: AutoRegressive 4D Gaussian Avatarization
figure: Autoregressive Transformer over Gaussian points — adaptive density, integrated animation binding.
abstract: Decoder-only transformer autoregressively emits a point cloud + per-point binding information, decoded into animatable 4D 3DGS — point density adapts to subject complexity.

title: One-shot Compositional 3D Head Avatars with Deformable Hair
figure: Compositional hair/face one-shot head avatar with physics-based hair dynamics.
abstract: Decouples hair from face: bald 3DGS rigged to FLAME for expressions, hair Gaussians driven by Position-Based Dynamics under head motion and gravity.

title: PartNerFace: Part-based Neural Radiance Fields for Animatable Facial Avatar Reconstruction
figure: Part-aware local MLPs inside a NeRF facial avatar for better unseen-expression generalization.
abstract: Part-based NeRF with multiple local MLPs softly partitioning canonical face space, enabling fine-grained part-specific deformation modeling.

title: Autoregressive Appearance Prediction for 3D Gaussian Avatars
figure: Autoregressive appearance latent resolves pose-appearance ambiguity and instability in data-driven avatars.
abstract: 3DGS avatar with a learned pose+appearance latent, where the latent is predicted autoregressively at driving time for temporally smooth novel-pose appearance.

title: FHAvatar: Fast and High-Fidelity Reconstruction of Face-and-Hair Composable 3D Head Avatar
figure: Composable face (planar GS) + hair (strand GS) head avatar from few-shot input.
abstract: Decouples face (planar Gaussians in texture space) and hair (strand-based Gaussians), reconstructing a composable head avatar from a few casual captures via an aggregated transformer.

title: OMG-Avatar: One-shot Multi-LOD Gaussian Head Avatar
figure: Multi-LOD one-shot 3DGS head — 0.2s inference, adaptable to device budget.
abstract: Single-image animatable head in 0.2s with a multi-LOD Gaussian representation — one model serves different hardware / latency budgets via level-of-detail switching.

title: EmoTaG: Emotion-Aware Talking Head Synthesis on Gaussian Splatting with Few-Shot Personalization
figure: Few-shot 3DGS talking head with FLAME-space motion prediction and audio→emotion gating.
abstract: Pretrain-and-adapt 3DGS talking-head framework that reformulates motion in FLAME parameter space and introduces a gated residual motion network for expressive, emotion-aware audio-driven synthesis.

title: LiftAvatar: Kinematic-Space Completion for Expression-Controlled 3D Gaussian Avatar Animation
figure: Plug-and-play kinematic-space completion that expands sparse cues into pose/expression diversity for stronger 3DGS avatar animation.
abstract: Video-diffusion Transformer that lifts sparse monocular expression cues into rich pose+expression sequences used to drive downstream 3DGS head avatars under extreme expressions.

title: FG-Portrait: 3D Flow Guided Editable Portrait Animation
figure: 3D-flow encoding that injects parametric-head motion priors into portrait video diffusion.
abstract: Introduces 3D flow priors from parametric head models into a portrait-animation diffusion model, with depth-guided sampling to align 2D↔3D motion.

title: EmbedTalk: Triplane-Free Talking Head Synthesis using Embedding-Driven Gaussian Deformation
figure: Triplane-free embedding-driven 3DGS talking head that is compact and mobile-ready.
abstract: Replaces triplane encoding with learnt embeddings driving deformable 3DGS, reaching 60 FPS on mobile GPUs while improving lip-sync and motion consistency.

title: PromptAvatar: Dual Diffusion Models for Multi-modal Guided 3D Avatar Generation
figure: Direct multi-modal prompt→3D mapping avoids iterative SDS and produces high-fidelity 3D faces fast.
abstract: Dual-diffusion (texture + geometry) framework with a 100k-pair text/image/texture/geometry dataset, generating 3D face avatars in under 10 seconds without SDS.

title: OMEGA-Avatar: One-shot Modeling of 360° Gaussian Avatars
figure: One-shot, 360° complete, animatable 3DGS head avatar in a single forward pass.
abstract: First feed-forward method that simultaneously satisfies three desiderata — generalizable, 360°-complete, and animatable — for single-image head avatars, via a semantic-aware mesh deformation module.

title: GeoDiff4D: Geometry-Aware Diffusion for 4D Head Avatar Reconstruction
figure: Geometry-aware diffusion prior (image+normal) injected into 3DGS for 4D head avatars.
abstract: Joint portrait + surface-normal diffusion with a pose-free expression encoder, feeding a 3DGS-based avatar for photorealistic 4D head reconstruction from a single image.

title: FG-3DGS: Toward Fine-Grained Facial Control in 3D Talking Head Generation
figure: Frequency-disentangled 3DGS talking head for high-fidelity lip-sync and reduced jitter.
abstract: Frequency-aware 3DGS talking head separating low-frequency face regions (shared MLP) and high-frequency eye/mouth regions (dedicated network) with post-rendering alignment.

title: Diff-PC: Identity-preserving and 3D-aware Controllable Diffusion for Zero-shot Portrait Customization
figure: 3D-face-guided controllable diffusion for zero-shot portrait ID preservation.
abstract: Zero-shot identity-preserving portrait diffusion guided by reconstructed 3D face priors and an ID-Encoder fusing local+global facial features.

title: RelightAnyone: A Generalized Relightable 3D Gaussian Head Model
figure: Generalizable flat-lit → relightable 3DGS head model — no OLAT needed at test time.
abstract: Learns a generic mapping from flat-lit 3DGS head avatars to relightable parameters, so any new subject can be relit without per-subject OLAT capture.

title: UIKA: Fast Universal Head Avatar from Pose-Free Images
figure: Pose-free UV-correspondence head avatar reconstructor — handles mixed unposed inputs.
abstract: Feed-forward animatable 3DGS head from any number of unposed inputs (single image, casual multi-view, or phone video), using pixel-to-UV correspondence to remove dependence on camera pose.

title: Avatar Forcing: Real-Time Interactive Head Avatar Generation for Natural Conversation
figure: Real-time causal diffusion forcing for interactive (two-way) talking avatars.
abstract: Diffusion-forcing framework for real-time, causally-consistent interactive head avatars — models two-way user/avatar interaction without needing expensive interaction-labelled training data.

title: Generalizable and Animatable 3D Full-Head Gaussian Avatar from a Single Image
figure: UV-embedded 3DGS on a parametric head → one-shot animatable 360° full-head reconstruction.
abstract: One-shot 3D full-head animatable avatar with Gaussians embedded in the UV space of a parametric face model, supporting simultaneous real-time animation and 360° rendering.

title: Lightweight High-Fidelity Low-Bitrate Talking Face Compression for 3D Video Conference
figure: Compact FLAME+3DGS head for bandwidth-constrained telepresence.
abstract: FLAME-parametric + 3DGS pipeline that transmits minimal facial metadata for low-bitrate real-time 3D video conferencing.

title: Splat-Portrait: Generalizing Talking Heads with Gaussian Splatting
figure: Prior-free 3DGS talking-head generator trained only with 2D reconstruction + SDS losses.
abstract: Learns a static 3DGS portrait + predicted 2D background from a single image and generates audio-conditioned lip motion without motion priors or 3D supervision.

title: Audio-Driven Talking Face Generation with Blink Embedding and Hash Grid Landmarks Encoding
figure: Landmark hash-grid + blink embeddings for sharper mouth motion in NeRF talking faces.
abstract: Dynamic NeRF talking-portrait model with blink embeddings and hash-grid landmark encoding plus a Dynamic Landmark Transformer.

title: GAT-NeRF: Geometry-Aware-Transformer Enhanced Neural Radiance Fields for High-Fidelity 4D Facial Avatars
figure: Transformer-augmented NeRF that captures wrinkles and high-frequency face details.
abstract: Hybrid NeRF with a Geometry-Aware Transformer fusing coordinates, 3DMM expression parameters, and latent codes for fine facial detail on monocular video.

title: FastGHA: Generalized Few-Shot 3D Gaussian Head Avatars with Real-Time Animation
figure: Real-time feed-forward Gaussian head avatar with foundation-model image features and point-map geometry supervision.
abstract: Feed-forward transformer encoder that fuses DINOv3 + SD-VAE features from a few images into per-pixel Gaussians, with a lightweight MLP for real-time expression animation.

title: RSATalker: Realistic Socially-Aware Talking Head Generation for Multi-Turn Conversation
figure: Socially-aware 3DGS talking head for dual-person conversation scenarios.
abstract: Mesh-driven facial motion bound to 3DGS rendering, augmented with a socially-aware query module encoding interpersonal relations for multi-turn dialogue.

title: ELITE: Efficient Gaussian Head Avatar from a Monocular Video via Learned Initialization and Test-time Generative Adaptation
figure: 3D-prior + 2D-diffusion synergy with single-step test-time adaptation for monocular head avatars.
abstract: Combines a feed-forward Mesh2Gaussian prior with a single-step rendering-guided diffusion enhancer at test time, 60× faster than 2D-generative-prior baselines.

title: MANGO: Natural Multi-speaker 3D Talking Head Generation via 2D-Lifted Enhancement
figure: Dual-audio diffusion motion + 3DGS rendering for bidirectional listen-and-speak dialogue avatars.
abstract: Two-stage multi-speaker talking-head generator: diffusion transformer for 3D motion from dual audio + 3DGS renderer with alternate 2D-level training on a 50-hour dataset.

title: GTAvatar: Bridging Gaussian Splatting and Texture Mapping for Relightable and Editable Gaussian Avatars
figure: UV-patch-embedded 2D Gaussians → editable PBR textures + relighting from monocular video.
abstract: Embeds each canonical 2D Gaussian in a UV texture patch of a template mesh, giving editable PBR material textures and a physically-based renderer on top of a monocular 3DGS head.

title: TexAvatars: Hybrid Texel-3D Representations for Stable Rigging of Photorealistic Gaussian Head Avatars
figure: Hybrid texel-rigged + free-3DGS head avatars — stable under extreme reenactment.
abstract: Combines global-texel 3DMM rigging (for stability) with free 3D Gaussians (for fidelity) under a hybrid rig that generalizes to extreme unseen expressions where pure-deformation methods break.

title: FlexAvatar: Flexible Large Reconstruction Model for Animatable Gaussian Head Avatars
figure: Input-number-agnostic LRM for pose-free head avatar reconstruction + real-time detail decoder.
abstract: Transformer LRM for head avatars that aggregates a flexible (1..N) number of pose-free, expression-free images into a canonical 3DGS, with a UV-position UNet decoder producing detailed expression-dependent deformations in real time.

title: Gaussian Pixel Codec Avatars: A Hybrid Representation for Efficient Rendering
figure: Mesh-for-skin + 3DGS-for-hair hybrid — extends Pixel Codec Avatars with splats.
abstract: Hybrid triangle-mesh + anisotropic 3DGS head avatar — the mesh handles skin efficiently, the Gaussians handle hair/beard — yielding photoreal heads renderable on mobile.

title: VASA-3D: Lifelike Audio-Driven Gaussian Head Avatars from a Single Image
figure: VASA-1 2D motion latent → 3DGS talking avatar from a single portrait.
abstract: Lifts the 2D VASA-1 motion latent into 3D: a motion-latent–conditioned 3D head model yields audio-driven, single-shot 3DGS talking avatars with fine expression details.

title: AGORA: Adversarial Generation Of Real-time Animatable 3D Gaussian Head Avatars
figure: GAN loss on a feed-forward 3DGS head avatar generator for sharper novel-view synthesis.
abstract: Adversarial training of a feed-forward 3DGS head reconstructor, sharpening appearance under novel views / expressions without per-subject optimization.

title: Instant Expressive Gaussian Head Avatar via 3D-Aware Expression Distillation
figure: Decouples animation representation from 3D head geometry and uses lightweight local fusion to reach diffusion-level expression quality at feed-forward speed.
abstract: Distills a 2D video-diffusion portrait animator into a feed-forward 3DGS head encoder that turns a single image into an animatable 3D-consistent avatar at 107 FPS.

title: EmoDiffTalk: Emotion-aware Diffusion for Editable 3D Gaussian Talking Head
figure: AU-based diffusion controller coupled to 3DGS talking head for multimodal emotion editing.
abstract: Action-unit-prompted Gaussian diffusion that enables fine-grained, text-controllable emotional editing of 3DGS talking heads.

title: HiFi-Portrait: Zero-shot Identity-preserved Portrait Generation with High-fidelity Multi-face Fusion
figure: HiFi-Net fusion + 3D landmark conditioning for ID-preserving portrait diffusion.
abstract: Diffusion-based zero-shot portrait generator using 3D-aware landmarks and a fine-grained multi-face fusion network for ID-preserved outputs with attribute control.

title: FactorPortrait: Controllable Portrait Animation via Disentangled Expression, Pose, and Viewpoint
figure: Expression/head-pose/viewpoint-disentangled video diffusion for portrait animation and novel views.
abstract: Video-diffusion portrait animator with disentangled expression latents + Plücker/normal-map camera & pose controls, trained on synthetic view/pose/expression data.

title: PersonaLive! Expressive Portrait Image Animation for Live Streaming
figure: Low-latency streaming portrait diffusion with 7-22× speedup for live scenarios.
abstract: Streaming real-time portrait diffusion combining implicit facial features + 3D keypoints, few-step appearance distillation, and autoregressive micro-chunk generation.

title: Mind-to-Face: Neural-Driven Photorealistic Avatar Synthesis via EEG Decoding
figure: First EEG-to-photorealistic-face pipeline with 3DGS rendering for affect-driven avatars.
abstract: CNN-Transformer that decodes non-invasive EEG into dense 3D position maps (65k+ vertices), rendered via 3DGS for subject-specific emotional facial expressions.

title: STAvatar: Soft Binding and Temporal Density Control for Monocular 3D Head Avatars
figure: UV-adaptive soft binding + temporal ADC — fixes mouth / eye artifacts on monocular 3DGS heads.
abstract: Replaces hard Gaussian-to-triangle binding with UV-adaptive soft binding and adds temporally aware density control, improving the mouth interior / eyelid region on monocular head avatars.

title: Dimitra++: Audio-driven diffusion model for expressive talking head generation
figure: Audio-conditioned motion diffusion transformer for joint lip/expression/pose 3D talking heads.
abstract: Conditional Motion Diffusion Transformer (cMDT) that jointly models lip, expression, and head-pose motion in 3D from a reference image and audio.

title: AEGIS: Preserving Privacy of 3D Facial Avatars with Adversarial Perturbations
figure: View-consistent identity masking for 3DGS avatars against biometric retrieval.
abstract: Applies adversarial perturbations to 3DGS color coefficients guided by a face-verification net to de-identify 3D avatars while preserving appearance and attributes.

title: TurboPortrait3D: Single-step diffusion-based fast portrait novel-view synthesis
figure: Single-step diffusion refinement over feed-forward avatars for fast multi-view-consistent portraits.
abstract: Enhances feed-forward image-to-avatar methods with a single-step diffusion refiner that operates on noisy 3D renders for low-latency novel-view portraits.

title: MVP4D: Multi-View Portrait Video Diffusion for Animatable 4D Avatars
figure: Multi-view video diffusion directly supervises a real-time 4D avatar instead of separate 3D fitting.
abstract: Multi-view video diffusion generating hundreds of frames over 360° from a single reference image and target expressions, then distilled into a real-time 4D avatar.

title: ArchitectHead: Continuous Level of Detail Control for 3D Gaussian Head Avatars
figure: Continuous LOD for 3DGS head avatars via UV-space feature-map resampling.
abstract: Parameterizes Gaussians in a 2D UV feature field of multi-level feature maps, enabling continuous LOD control by resampling without retraining.

title: PGSTalker: Real-Time Audio-Driven Talking Head Generation via 3D Gaussian Splatting with Pixel-Aware Density Control
figure: Density-aware 3DGS + gated audio fusion for real-time lip-synced talking heads.
abstract: 3DGS audio-driven talking head using pixel-aware point density control and a lightweight multimodal gated fusion module for audio/spatial features.

title: SVG-Head: Hybrid Surface-Volumetric Gaussians for High-Fidelity Head Reconstruction and Real-Time Editing
figure: Dual (surface + volumetric) Gaussians + disentangled texture → real-time head appearance editing.
abstract: Couples FLAME-bound surface Gaussians (for geometry) with disentangled texture images (for global appearance), enabling real-time appearance edits on a photoreal 3DGS head.

title: BecomingLit: Relightable Gaussian Avatars with Hybrid Neural Shading
figure: Affordable light-stage + hybrid (neural diffuse × analytical specular) shading for 3DGS heads.
abstract: A low-cost light-stage capture plus a hybrid neural diffuse BRDF + analytical specular shader, applied to FLAME-rigged 3D Gaussians — relightable head avatars at interactive rates.

title: IM-Portrait: Learning 3D-aware Video Diffusion for Photorealistic Talking Heads from Monocular Videos
figure: Single-stage diffusion-to-MPI talking head that yields geometry-consistent binocular VR-ready output.
abstract: Directly generates Multiplane Images via a 3D-aware video diffusion model from a single identity image and expression controls, skipping explicit NeRF/3DGS reconstruction.

title: GSAC: Leveraging Gaussian Splatting for Photorealistic Avatar Creation with Unity Integration
figure: 3DGS avatar + Unity engine editor targeted at application developers.
abstract: End-to-end 3DGS avatar pipeline from monocular video, packaged as a Unity-integrated Gaussian splatting editor for VR/AR deployment.

title: HRAvatar: High-Quality and Relightable Gaussian Head Avatar
figure: End-to-end tracked + BRDF-decomposed 3DGS head avatar from monocular video.
abstract: Monocular 3DGS head avatar with end-to-end tracking refinement, a richer learnable deformation model, and a PBR-style BRDF decomposition that yields realistic novel-light rendering.

title: Follow Your Motion: A Generic Temporal Consistency Portrait Editing Framework with Trajectory Guidance
figure: Trajectory-guided diffusion editor that inherits 3DGS motion for consistent portrait/talking-head edits.
abstract: Diffusion-based portrait editor conditioned on 3DGS-rendered talking heads; uses motion trajectories and re-weighted attention for temporally consistent edits.

title: DiffPortrait360: Consistent Portrait Diffusion for 360 View Synthesis
figure: Style-omniscient 360° head diffusion supporting anthropomorphic/stylized forms and NeRF distillation.
abstract: Extends DiffPortrait3D with a back-of-head ControlNet and dual appearance module to generate 360-degree consistent head views from a single image, lifting to NeRF.

title: LAM: Large Avatar Model for One-shot Animatable Gaussian Head
figure: Large one-shot model that outputs immediately animatable Gaussian heads from a single image.
abstract: Uses FLAME canonical points as transformer queries over multi-scale image features to predict canonical Gaussian attributes, enabling real-time LBS animation and rendering without per-subject optimization.

title: Avat3r: Large Animatable Gaussian Reconstruction Model for High-Fidelity 3D Head Avatars
figure: LRM-scale transformer → animatable FLAME-rigged GS head from 4 images.
abstract: A large reconstruction model that turns 4 input images into an animatable FLAME-rigged Gaussian head avatar via a single forward pass — the first truly SOTA one-shot avatar generator.

title: FaceLift: Learning Generalizable Single Image 3D Face Reconstruction from Synthetic Heads
figure: Single-image full-head reconstruction via multi-view diffusion and a GS-LRM Gaussian reconstructor.
abstract: Generates consistent side/back views from one face image, then reconstructs a full 3D Gaussian head with a transformer-based GS-LRM model trained on synthetic head data.

title: CAP4D: Creating Animatable 4D Portrait Avatars with Morphable Multi-View Diffusion Models
figure: Morphable multi-view diffusion creates real-time animatable 4D portrait avatars from 1-100 images.
abstract: Generates pose- and expression-controlled multi-view images with a morphable diffusion model, then fits a controllable 4D avatar that can be animated via 3DMM parameters and rendered in real time.

title: GAF: Gaussian Avatar Reconstruction from Monocular Videos via Multi-view Diffusion
figure: Multi-view head diffusion prior inside monocular 3DGS fitting — fixes under-constrained novel views.
abstract: Uses a multi-view head-diffusion prior (conditioned on FLAME normal maps + identity VAE features) to hallucinate consistent side/back views during monocular 3DGS head training.

title: Generalizable and Animatable Gaussian Head Avatar
figure: One-shot generalizable animatable head avatar (single image → 3DGS + FLAME rig).
abstract: A single feed-forward network reconstructs an animatable FLAME-driven Gaussian head avatar from one image, trained on a large head-video corpus.

title: URAvatar: Universal Relightable Gaussian Codec Avatars
figure: Phone-scan to relightable 3DGS head avatar via a universal learned prior.
abstract: A universal prior that produces a drivable, relightable Gaussian-Codec head avatar from a phone scan — combining phone-scan personalization, 3DGS, and relighting.

title: VRMM: A Volumetric Relightable Morphable Head Model
figure: Volumetric morphable head prior with disentangled identity, expression, and illumination spaces.
abstract: Learns a relightable volumetric parametric head model from LightStage captures, supporting few-shot personalized reconstruction, animation, and controllable illumination.

title: GaussianHeads: End-to-End Learning of Drivable Gaussian Head Avatars from Coarse-to-fine Representations
figure: Coarse-to-fine drivable Gaussian head avatars trained end-to-end from multi-view imagery.
abstract: Learns a hierarchical head avatar: coarse template deformations from image features followed by surface-initialized 3D Gaussians refined for dynamic expressions, mouth interiors, and large head motion.

title: HeadGaP: Few-shot 3D Head Avatar via Generalizable Gaussian Priors
figure: Few-shot head-avatar creation via a generalizable 3DGS prior.
abstract: Learns a Gaussian head prior across many subjects, then adapts to a new subject from as few as one or three images.

title: 3D Gaussian Parametric Head Model
figure: Parametric 3DGS head model with decoupled identity and expression controls.
abstract: Builds a Gaussian-based parametric head model that captures detailed hair, accessories, identity, and expression variation, enabling real-time high-quality rendering and single-image reconstruction.

title: GGHead: Fast and Generalizable 3D Gaussian Heads
figure: Generative model of FLAME-anchored 3DGS heads from 2D images.
abstract: A 3D-GAN whose generator outputs a UV-space texture of 3D Gaussians on a FLAME mesh, trained purely from 2D images; samples photoreal animatable head avatars at interactive rates.

title: NPGA: Neural Parametric Gaussian Avatars
figure: NPHM-conditioned 3DGS avatars with per-Gaussian latent features for fine-grained expression dynamics.
abstract: Creates high-fidelity controllable avatars from multi-view video by distilling NPHM deformations into rasterization-friendly forward warps and learning expression-dependent Gaussian dynamics.

title: GeneAvatar: Generic Expression-Aware Volumetric Head Avatar Editing from a Single Image
figure: Expression-aware single-image edit propagation across dynamic head avatars.
abstract: A generic editing approach that propagates a single-image edit across all expressions and views of an existing volumetric head avatar, via an expression-aware diffusion model.

title: TalkingGaussian: Structure-Persistent 3D Talking Head Synthesis via Gaussian Splatting
figure: Audio-driven talking head on 3DGS with explicit structural decomposition.
abstract: Audio-driven talking-head avatar on 3DGS with a structure-preserving deformation field that decouples lip, face, and head motion.

title: HeadStudio: Text to Animatable Head Avatars with 3D Gaussian Splatting
figure: Text-to-animatable head avatar on 3DGS with FLAME rig.
abstract: Generates a FLAME-rigged Gaussian head avatar from text using SDS with a specialized view-dependent camera scheme for consistent faces.

title: One2Avatar: Generative Implicit Head Avatar for Few-shot User Adaptation
figure: Few-shot personalization from a generative 3DMM-anchored implicit head-avatar prior.
abstract: Learns a generative NeRF-based animatable head-avatar prior from multi-view multi-expression data, then adapts it to one or a few user images with joint camera and 3DMM refinement.

title: HQ3DAvatar: High-quality Implicit 3D Head Avatar
figure: Implicit canonical-space head avatar with hash encoding for high-quality free-viewpoint rendering.
abstract: Learns a photorealistic implicit head avatar from multi-view data, with image-conditioned canonical features and optical-flow regularization for temporally consistent drivable renderings.

title: PSAvatar: A Point-Based Shape Model for Real-Time Head Avatar Animation with 3D Gaussian Splatting
figure: Point-prior + 3DGS fast head avatars.
abstract: Combines a point-based discrete shape prior with Gaussian splatting to speed up monocular head-avatar reconstruction and rendering.

title: GPAvatar: Generalizable and Precise Head Avatar from Image(s)
figure: Dynamic-point expression field on a triplane — precise one-shot head reenactment.
abstract: One-shot (or few-shot) generalizable head avatar with a dynamic point-based expression field and a tri-plane identity encoder, enabling precise cross-identity reenactment.

title: InvertAvatar: Incremental GAN Inversion for Generalized Head Avatars
figure: Incremental 3D GAN inversion for generalized head avatars from one or more source images.
abstract: Builds an animatable 3D GAN prior with expression control and neural texture encoding, using recurrent aggregation to improve geometry and texture from few observations.

title: GaussianAvatars: Photorealistic Head Avatars with Rigged 3D Gaussians
figure: FLAME-rigged Gaussians — the de facto head-avatar template for 3DGS.
abstract: Rigs 3D Gaussians to the triangles of a tracked FLAME mesh, so expressions and pose drive the Gaussians via local frames. Real-time, sharp head avatars from multi-view capture.

title: MonoGaussianAvatar: Monocular Gaussian Point-based Head Avatar
figure: Monocular head avatars with FLAME-anchored Gaussians + per-point MLP.
abstract: Per-point deformation MLP drives 3D Gaussians that live in a FLAME-anchored canonical space; produces sharp monocular head avatars in real time.

title: FlashAvatar: High-fidelity Head Avatar with Efficient Gaussian Embedding
figure: UV-atlas–initialized Gaussians for very fast monocular head avatars.
abstract: Initializes Gaussians on a UV texel grid of a 3DMM mesh and learns position offsets + features, reaching real-time monocular head avatars in minutes.

title: Gaussian Head Avatar: Ultra High-fidelity Head Avatar via Dynamic Gaussians
figure: SOTA studio head avatar with 2K rendering and clean geometry initialization.
abstract: Studio-captured head avatar with a controllable dynamic Gaussian representation and a two-stage (geometry → appearance) training, reaching ultra-high fidelity at 2K.

title: Gaussian Codec Avatars
figure: Codec-Avatar family ported to 3DGS, setting the bar for studio head realism.
abstract: Meta Codec Avatars on Gaussian Splatting: encodes identity and expression into a latent-driven 3DGS head, enabling high-fidelity telepresence at interactive rates.

title: Relightable Gaussian Codec Avatars
figure: Relightable extension of Gaussian Codec Avatars — current SOTA studio head relighting.
abstract: Adds a learned visibility + BRDF decomposition per Gaussian to Gaussian Codec Avatars, producing studio-grade relightable head avatars under any HDRI.

title: HAAR: Text-Conditioned Generative Model of 3D Strand-based Human Hairstyles
figure: Text-conditioned strand-level hair generation.
abstract: A diffusion model over a latent hair-strand representation that generates strand-based 3D hairstyles from text prompts, compatible with standard groom pipelines.

title: MonoNPHM: Dynamic Head Reconstruction from Monocular Videos
figure: Monocular fitting of a neural parametric head SDF (NPHM) with expression disentanglement.
abstract: Fits NPHM — a neural parametric head SDF — to monocular video via a latent space optimization, giving metrically-correct, expression-disentangled head geometry.

title: VOODOO 3D: Volumetric Portrait Disentanglement for One-Shot 3D Head Reenactment
figure: One-shot 3D-aware head reenactment via volumetric appearance/expression disentanglement.
abstract: Lifts source and driver portraits into tri-plane radiance fields, disentangles source appearance from driver expression, and renders high-fidelity view-consistent reenactments for arbitrary views.

title: DiffusionAvatars: Deferred Diffusion for High-fidelity 3D Head Avatars
figure: Deferred diffusion renderer driven by NPHM geometry, expression tokens, and rigged triplane features.
abstract: Combines an NPHM proxy render with cross-attended expression codes and canonical triplane features to synthesize high-fidelity, temporally consistent drivable head avatars.

title: GAN-Avatar: Controllable Personalized GAN-based Human Head Avatar
figure: Personalized 3D-aware GAN avatar controlled by mapping 3DMM expression parameters into latent space.
abstract: Learns a person-specific animatable head avatar from images and camera parameters without requiring precise expression tracking, decoupling appearance reconstruction from animation control.

title: Drivable 3D Gaussian Avatars
figure: Body-scale drivable 3DGS avatars using tetrahedral cage deformations instead of LBS.
abstract: Embeds 3D Gaussian primitives in tetrahedral cages and decomposes avatars into layers, enabling real-time photorealistic drivable humans from dense multi-view video.

title: AvatarStudio: Text-driven Editing of 3D Dynamic Head Avatars
figure: Identity-preserving text editing of dynamic head avatars.
abstract: Text-driven editing of a captured NeRF-based dynamic head avatar via a personalized InstructPix2Pix-style diffusion model.

title: TriPlaneNet: An Encoder for EG3D Inversion
figure: Feed-forward EG3D inversion using latent prediction plus tri-plane residual offsets.
abstract: Directly predicts tri-plane offsets for EG3D inversion, improving identity preservation and novel-view consistency compared with latent-only encoder inversion.

title: Make Encoder Great Again in 3D GAN Inversion through Geometry and Occlusion-Aware Encoding
figure: Geometry- and occlusion-aware encoder for fast EG3D inversion.
abstract: Adds geometry-aware latent encoding, feature refinement, and occlusion-aware fusion to recover high-fidelity 3D GAN inversions much faster than optimization-based methods.

title: Learning Personalized High Quality Volumetric Head Avatars from Monocular RGB Videos
figure: Per-vertex local radiance MLPs anchored on a 3DMM for monocular head avatars.
abstract: MonoAvatar attaches per-vertex local MLPs to a tracked 3DMM, producing a volumetric head rendered by volume rendering; sharper than NerFACE/INSTA on monocular input.

title: DreamFace: Progressive Generation of Animatable 3D Faces under Text Guidance
figure: Progressive text-to-animatable-face pipeline with production assets.
abstract: Stages geometry, texture, and animation generation of a production-ready animatable face from a text prompt, using CLIP guidance + diffusion.

title: Exp-GAN: 3D-Aware Facial Image Generation with Expression Control
figure: 3D-aware facial image GAN with explicit pose, expression, shape, and appearance controls.
abstract: Combines a 3DMM/neural-texture face branch with a NeRF branch for non-face regions, using depth-based integration for view-consistent expression-controlled synthesis.

title: Next3D: Generative Neural Texture Rasterization for 3D-Aware Head Avatars
figure: Generative neural texture rasterization for animatable 3D-aware head avatars.
abstract: Learns neural textures on a parametric mesh template, rasterizes them into tri-plane features, and volume-renders 3D-aware portraits with expression control and topology flexibility.

title: 3DFaceShop: Explicitly Controllable 3D-Aware Portrait Generation
figure: Explicitly controllable 3D-aware portrait generation guided by 3DMM semantic parameters.
abstract: Generates 3D-aware portraits controllable by pose, identity, expression, and illumination, with volume blending to stabilize non-face regions under expression changes.

title: 3D-FM GAN: Towards 3D-Controllable Face Manipulation
figure: Conditional GAN for identity-preserving 3D-controllable face manipulation.
abstract: Encodes an input face and physically-based 3D edit renderings into StyleGAN latent spaces, using co-modulation to support pose, expression, and lighting edits without per-image optimization.

title: PointAvatar: Deformable Point-based Head Avatars from Videos
figure: Deformable point-cloud head avatar — points beat volumes for faces.
abstract: Represents the head as an oriented point cloud in canonical space, deformed per-frame by a FLAME-driven network. Faster and sharper than NeRF-based IMavatar.

title: Rodin: A Generative Model for Sculpting 3D Digital Avatars Using Diffusion
figure: Tri-plane latent diffusion for 3D head avatar generation.
abstract: Trains a diffusion model in 3D tri-plane latent space to generate 3D head avatars from text / image, with an auto-encoder that compresses radiance fields.

title: Authentic Volumetric Avatars from a Phone Scan
figure: Universal codec-avatar prior + phone-scan personalization.
abstract: Hyper-realistic head avatars from a short phone-scan by leveraging a large universal prior trained on studio captures, then fine-tuning per subject.

title: Instant Volumetric Head Avatars
figure: Instant-NGP + FLAME-anchored deformation = 10-minute head avatars.
abstract: INSTA builds an expression-driven NeRF head avatar in minutes by deforming a multi-resolution hash grid around a tracked FLAME mesh.

title: AvatarMAV: Fast 3D Head Avatar Reconstruction Using Motion-Aware Neural Voxels
figure: Linear-blended neural voxel grids for fast, controllable head avatars.
abstract: Decomposes a head avatar into motion-aware neural voxels: a canonical appearance grid plus motion grids that are linearly combined by expression coefficients.

title: MegaPortraits: One-shot Megapixel Neural Head Avatars
figure: One-shot neural head avatars at megapixel resolution with stronger cross-driving quality.
abstract: Combines medium-resolution video data with high-resolution still images to train one-shot neural head avatars that preserve high-resolution identity appearance under novel driving motion.

title: Neural Strands: Learning Hair Geometry and Appearance from Multi-View Images
figure: Explicit neural strands — strand-level hair for avatars.
abstract: Learns a volumetric field of oriented hair strands with per-strand appearance, recovering individual fibers from multi-view studio captures.

title: IDE-3D: Interactive Disentangled Editing for High-Resolution 3D-Aware Portrait Synthesis
figure: Interactive high-resolution editing for 3D-aware portrait synthesis with disentangled semantics.
abstract: Combines a 3D-semantics-aware generator, hybrid GAN inversion, and a canonical editor for view-consistent portrait drawing, semantic editing, and style control.

title: RigNeRF: Fully Controllable Neural 3D Portraits
figure: Deformable NeRF portrait with 3DMM-based rigged control.
abstract: Conditions a portrait NeRF on 3DMM pose + expression with a deformation field, giving rig-like control of head orientation and expressions.

title: HeadNeRF: A Real-time NeRF-based Parametric Head Model
figure: Real-time NeRF-based parametric head model with pose and semantic attribute control.
abstract: Integrates neural radiance fields into a parametric head representation and accelerates rendering with 2D neural rendering, reducing render time to real-time rates while preserving facial detail.

title: Neural Head Avatars from Monocular RGB Videos
figure: Mesh-based monocular head avatar with explicit geometry + learned texture.
abstract: Hybrid head avatar: a deformable FLAME mesh whose vertex offsets and texture are learned from monocular video, giving controllable geometry + photo textures.

title: I M Avatar: Implicit Morphable Head Avatars from Videos
figure: Implicit (SDF) FLAME-driven head avatar from monocular video.
abstract: Implicit morphable head avatar: learns a per-subject canonical SDF + neural deformation driven by FLAME pose/expression, with ray marching for differentiable surface rendering.

title: Deep Relightable Appearance Models for Animatable Faces
figure: Light-stage relightable codec-family face avatars.
abstract: Studio light-stage–captured relightable face with view- and light-conditioned decoders, producing drivable avatars controllable by arbitrary environment illumination.

title: Pixel Codec Avatars
figure: Lightweight per-pixel neural shader enables real-time codec avatars.
abstract: Decodes per-pixel features on a coarse mesh surface and renders them with a tiny neural shader, lowering compute at the expense of a slightly lower-res geometry.

title: Mixture of Volumetric Primitives for Efficient Neural Rendering
figure: Mesh-anchored mini-voxel primitives — conceptual ancestor of mesh-anchored 3DGS.
abstract: Represents a dynamic actor as a cloud of volumetric primitives attached to a guide mesh, each a tiny RGBα voxel grid — fast, sharp, and animatable.

title: Dynamic Neural Radiance Fields for Monocular 4D Facial Avatar Reconstruction
figure: First expression-conditioned neural-radiance head avatar from monocular video.
abstract: NerFACE: a monocular head avatar where a 3DMM expression code conditions the NeRF, allowing expression and viewpoint control after a short subject-specific fit.

title: Deep Appearance Models for Face Rendering
figure: View-conditioned VAE texture — the root of the Codec Avatars line.
abstract: Encodes a view-conditioned high-resolution face texture into a VAE, decoded on top of a tracked mesh. The first "Codec Avatar" — foundation for Meta’s telepresence stack.

title: Learning a Model of Facial Shape and Expression from 4D Scans
figure: Articulated parametric head model (neck/jaw/eyes) that became the de facto head avatar base.
abstract: FLAME: a compact parametric face model with identity, expression, and pose blendshapes learned from 4D scan sequences. Foundation for almost every head-avatar method.
